plot_frame_box.description: Plot frame defined by leftmost/rightmost x-gridline positions ($1,000 at col=130, $100,000 at col=671) and top/bottom y-tick label centers (80 years at row=152, 20 years at row=464). Detected from vertical gridline streaks in lower clean band (rows 440-470) and from y-axis label text projection.

pixels_per_coordinate_unit.x_note: pixels per log10(x) unit (1 decade = 270.48 px). Because x-axis is logarithmic, ratio is in log space.
pixels_per_coordinate_unit.x_unit_label: pixels per log10(GDP per capita, int-$)
pixels_per_coordinate_unit.y_unit_label: pixels per year of life expectancy

data_to_pixel_formula.note: x_value is GDP per capita in int-$; y_value is life expectancy in years.

worked_example.scenario: Locate the $10,000 GDP, 70-year life-expectancy reference point.
worked_example.verification: Matches detected $10,000 gridline at col=400 and 70-years label centerline at row=204 (within 1 px).

detection_internals.rule: x-axis: log10 fit through 7 vertical-streak gridline column positions detected in a clean band (rows 440-470) by projecting (gray<245) pixel counts and clustering. y-axis: linear fit through 7 tick-label-text vertical centers detected by projecting dark-pixel rows in the left margin band.
detection_internals.legend_exclusion_note: Continent legend (6 swatches) plus the 'Circles sized by Population' size-legend. Masked out before scatter CC analysis to prevent the legend swatches/size markers from being counted as data. Note: data_csv_legend_check.py assumes a LINEAR x-axis, so its predicted col positions for our log10 axis are not literal pixel positions; data.csv extraction physically excluded the legend region during CC analysis.
